stages.label: Cloudflare deploy access
stages.detail: Cloudflare deploy auth is not available in CLI env or browser-independent shell.
stages.nextAction: Run wrangler login in Chrome/terminal, or set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID before Cloudflare Pages deploy.

stages.label: Supabase management access
stages.detail: Supabase CLI is not logged in and SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN is not set.
stages.nextAction: Run supabase login or set SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN before creating/applying production Supabase resources.

stages.label: Manual production env values
stages.detail: Supabase, realtime data and Filecoin production values must be present before strict evidence can pass.
stages.nextAction: Fill .env.production.local with Supabase, data provider and Filecoin values, then rerun access:preflight.

stages.label: Account cloud sync targets
stages.command: bun run supabase:bootstrap && bun run sharing:bootstrap
stages.detail: User login, cloud profile identity, public profile URL and clean-session proof targets must be generated from Supabase read-back.
stages.nextAction: Run supabase:bootstrap after Supabase access is ready, then run sharing:bootstrap to prove the public profile/proof pages restore without localStorage.

stages.label: Generated verification targets
stages.detail: Production verification targets must come from cloud rows, live fixture scouting and Filecoin CID read-back.
stages.nextAction: Run supabase:bootstrap, scout:data-targets, seal:production-targets and env:production after backend access is ready.

commands: bun run supabase:bootstrap && bun run sharing:bootstrap
nextAction: Run wrangler login in Chrome/terminal, or set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID before Cloudflare Pages deploy.
